headline: Gilead Sciences to acquire Ouro Medicines, expanding autoimmune therapy portfolio
summary: Gilead Sciences Inc (NASDAQ:GILD, XETRA:GIS) announced it has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Ouro Medicines, a privately held biotech company developing T cell engager therapies for autoimmune diseases. The acquisition adds OM336 (gamgertamig), a clinical-stage BCMAxCD3...

headline: Gilead, with Ouro deal, wagers $1.7B on bispecifics for autoimmune diseases
